        • [ - ] haunani - member since 21-Nov-25

          Fulham look set to take on the game, especially at home, where their possession structure and use of wide areas usually give them territorial control. The key for them will be how quickly they can move the ball to stretch Forest’s compact shape and create space between the lines, rather than letting attacks become predictable. Forest are likely to be more reactive, focusing on defensive discipline and quick transitions. Their main threat should come when Fulham commit numbers forward, with counter-attacks aimed at exploiting space behind the full-backs. The balance between Fulham’s control and Forest’s efficiency on the break will likely define the match.
